label: General B40 financial aid
description: Search for broad Malaysian B40 financial support schemes.
descriptionBm: Cari skim sokongan kewangan B40 Malaysia secara umum.

label: Sumbangan Tunai Rahmah / LHDN
description: Search for STR and LHDN cash assistance eligibility.
query: site:hasil.gov.my OR site:bantuantunai.hasil.gov.my Sumbangan Tunai Rahmah kelayakan 2026
descriptionBm: Cari kelayakan bantuan tunai STR dan LHDN.

label: JKM welfare assistance
description: Search for welfare aid from Jabatan Kebajikan Masyarakat.
descriptionBm: Cari bantuan kebajikan daripada Jabatan Kebajikan Masyarakat.

label: Student / education aid
description: Search for B40 student and education support.
query: site:mohe.gov.my OR site:moe.gov.my bantuan pelajar B40 kelayakan
descriptionBm: Cari sokongan pelajar dan pendidikan untuk B40.

label: Food aid / MyKasih
description: Search for food aid and basic goods support.
query: site:mykasih.com.my bantuan makanan kelayakan OR site:gov.my bantuan makanan B40
descriptionBm: Cari bantuan makanan dan sokongan barangan asas.

label: Employment / PERKESO aid
description: Search for job seeker, employment, and social security support.
query: site:perkeso.gov.my bantuan pekerjaan kelayakan OR site:perkeso.gov.my insentif pekerjaan
descriptionBm: Cari sokongan pencari kerja, pekerjaan, dan keselamatan sosial.

label: Housing aid
description: Search for housing assistance and rental/home ownership support.
query: site:gov.my bantuan perumahan B40 kelayakan Malaysia
descriptionBm: Cari bantuan perumahan, sewaan, atau pemilikan rumah.

label: Healthcare aid
description: Search for healthcare and medical financial assistance.
query: site:moh.gov.my OR site:gov.my bantuan kesihatan kewangan kelayakan
descriptionBm: Cari bantuan kewangan kesihatan dan perubatan.

label: Custom search
description: Admin enters a custom official-source search query.
descriptionBm: Admin memasukkan pertanyaan carian sumber rasmi tersuai.
